PROJECT OVERVIEW:
A software application allows users to manage their products in a virtual fridge, including adding, modifying, removing, and messaging other users. Users can also purchase tokens for transactions and receive notifications. The application has non-functional requirements focusing on usability, efficiency, portability, and security.
---------------------------

---------------------------

PROJECT OVERVIEW:
The project involves an application with functionalities related to product management, user access, and data security. The application uses Firebase for database management and must comply with GDPR regulations. Key requirements include ensuring a stable internet connection, performance metrics such as response time and storage space, and user-friendly interfaces. The application must also support the right to be forgotten and ensure data privacy.
